items.name: parallel-universe-shell
items.title: Parallel Universe Shell
items.description: Unified public product shell with the rail: 发现, 阅读, 书城, 会员. Local Creator and operator settings stay direct or backstage.

items.name: liquid-glass
items.title: Liquid Glass
items.description: Parallel Universe liquid-glass surface primitive built in shadcn style with tone, depth, padding and metric helpers.

items.name: reading-paper
items.title: Reading Paper
items.description: Light manuscript reading surface for long-form Chinese fiction.

items.name: book-card
items.title: Book Card
items.description: Commercial book/universe card for discovery, library and template detail flows.

items.name: topic-filter-bar
items.title: Topic Filter Bar
items.description: Shared hot-topic filter bar for discovery and library routes, with route-aware topic selection.

items.name: ranked-world-list
items.title: Ranked World List
items.description: Shared ranked story list for discovery and library side panels.

items.name: choice-card
items.title: Choice Card
items.description: Reader-facing branch choice card with consequence and worldline action.

items.name: creator-conversation-panel
items.title: Creator Conversation Panel
items.description: Socratic creator entry panel with prompt, textarea, action state and responsive story-seed examples.

items.name: creator-dialogue-thread
items.title: Creator Dialogue Thread
items.description: Post-seed creator dialogue pattern with user seed, readable opening draft, two follow-up questions and composer.

items.name: creator-reasoning-map
items.title: Creator Reasoning Map
items.description: Visible author-facing creative reasoning summary for hook, character gap, scene pressure, world rule and tone without exposing raw model reasoning.

items.name: creator-story-notes
items.title: Creator Story Notes
items.description: Author-facing story notes that keep character, scene, rule, conflict and hook context without implementation copy.

items.name: studio-trend-ops-panel
items.title: Studio Trend Ops Panel
items.description: Backstage trend refresh and scan-contract panel for operators; keeps scanning details out of public pages.

items.name: capability-map-panel
items.title: Capability Map Panel
items.description: Backstage frontend/service capability map for handoff and ops review.

items.name: setting-card
items.title: Setting Card
items.description: Creator/Studio setting card for confirmed configuration and backstage review surfaces.

items.name: plan-card
items.title: Plan Card
items.description: Billing plan card for Free, Pro and Team plans.
